compiled_state.title: RED: Write guard tests for .tickets/*.md fixtures in validate-issues and orphaned-tasks tests
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: TDD RED phase for validate-issues and orphaned-tasks test cleanup. Add test_no_tickets_dir_md_writes_in_validate_tests to test-v2-clean-guard.sh: grep tests/scripts/test-validate-issues.sh for pattern writing .md files to base/.tickets/ directory, assert output is empty. Also add test_no_tickets_dir_md_writes_in_orphaned_tests for test-orphaned-tasks.sh. Both FAIL RED since those test files currently write .md fixture files. Depends on: T1 guard file already exists.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
